pi_items.source: Task description specifies exact filename for save location
Task description and setup_task.sh both reference this directory path
Combination of expected_directory and expected_filename from task description
Task description explicitly states 'Create a 3-page flipchart' with Page 1 (Do Now), Page 2 (Objectives), Page 3 (Vocabulary)

Task description requires: 'Do Now' title on Page 1, phrase 'American Revolution' on Page 1, 'Learning Objectives' or 'Objectives' title on Page 2, 'Vocabulary' or 'Key Vocabulary' title on Page 3, and four vocabulary terms: Revolution, Colony, Independence, Patriot. Export_result.sh checks for all these terms including 'Revolution'. README line 42 lists required vocabulary terms as 'At least 3 of: Colony, Independence, Patriot, Revolution'.
Task description specifies 'four colored rectangle boxes on the canvas — one box for each of the following four terms: Revolution, Colony, Independence, Patriot'

Task description states 'A 7th grade social studies teacher needs a lesson opener flipchart for a unit on the American Revolution'. Verified as standard 7th grade curriculum topic via web search of Core Knowledge and American Battlefield Trust curriculum resources.

privileged_info_summary: Task creates a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart on American Revolution (standard 7th grade social studies topic) saved as american_revolution_opener.flipchart in /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts. Page 1 requires 'Do Now' title with 'American Revolution' phrase; Page 2 requires 'Learning Objectives' or 'Objectives' title; Page 3 requires 'Vocabulary' title with four colored rectangle boxes for the vocabulary terms: Revolution, Colony, Independence, and Patriot. ActivInspire is real educational software by Promethean World used in schools for interactive lesson delivery. CRITICAL DISCREPANCY: Metadata's required_terms list is incomplete—it omits 'Revolution' which is explicitly required as one of the four vocabulary terms and is checked by the verifier logic, and omits 'American Revolution'/'American' which must appear on Page 1.
